name: AuthService
description: Handles authentication, login, and token validation

name: UserService
description: Manages user profiles, registration, and account data

name: ProfileService
description: Handles user profile details and personalization

name: SessionService
description: Manages user sessions and active login states

name: ProductService
description: Manages product catalog, details, and listings

name: InventoryService
description: Tracks product stock levels and availability

name: SearchService
description: Provides search functionality across products

name: RecommendationService
description: Generates product recommendations based on user behavior

name: CartService
description: Handles shopping cart operations and item management

name: OrderService
description: Handles order placement and checkout process

name: CheckoutService
description: Processes checkout including validation and payment initiation

name: PaymentService
description: Handles payment processing and transactions

name: BillingService
description: Manages billing records and payment history

name: InvoiceService
description: Generates invoices for completed transactions

name: NotificationService
description: Sends notifications to users about system events

name: EmailService
description: Handles sending emails to users

name: SMSService
description: Handles sending SMS messages to users

name: PushNotificationService
description: Sends push notifications to mobile devices

name: ShippingService
description: Manages shipping and logistics for orders

name: DeliveryService
description: Handles delivery of orders to customers

name: TrackingService
description: Tracks shipment status and delivery progress

name: WarehouseService
description: Manages warehouse storage and operations

name: SupplierService
description: Manages supplier information and procurement

name: LoggingService
description: Collects and stores logs from all services

name: MonitoringService
description: Monitors system health and performance metrics

name: AlertService
description: Sends alerts based on monitoring and system events

name: CacheService
description: Handles caching for faster data retrieval

name: CDNService
description: Delivers static content efficiently via content delivery network

name: MediaService
description: Manages media files like images and videos

name: UploadService
description: Handles file uploads and storage operations
